text:
Market today: Geopolitical tensions are high with escalating U.S.-Iran conflict and rising oil prices. This creates a risk-off mood, which can pressure growth-oriented tech and chip names. 

Your holdings: SOXL (-37.71%, SELL) and SPAL (-48.51%, NEW) are leveraged ETFs with significant drawdowns, needing urgent attention. QQQI (-2.09%, TRIM) is near its stop. Remember, margin amplifies these drops. 

Watch: Keep a close eye on geopolitical developments and their impact on broader market sentiment. Re-evaluate stops on your leveraged positions. 

Bottom line: Prioritize risk management and defense of your leveraged, deep-red positions in this uncertain environment.
plays: Re-evaluate SOXL (SELL) and SPAL (NEW) given deep losses and leveraged nature; consider cutting losses or aggressively tightening stops.
QQQI (TRIM) is near its stop at 52; respect that level to manage risk on this income anchor.
No new buys today - hold and watch. Geopolitical risks suggest caution over initiating new long positions.
